# kSecCodeInfoCMS

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is the CMS cryptographic object that secures the code signature.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecCodeInfoCMS: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData] object. Empty for ad-hoc signed code.

Specify the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCSSigningInformation] flag when calling the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCodeCopySigningInformation(_:_:_:)] function to get this information.
